name: Political Opinions
description: Political opinions, affiliations, party membership, or voting behavior.

regulatory_basis.name: GDPR Article 9(1)
regulatory_basis.summary: Political opinions are a special category of personal data.

regulatory_basis.name: EU DSA Article 26
regulatory_basis.summary: Explicitly prohibits using political opinions for advertising targeting.

includes: Issue-based political segments (e.g., 'gun rights supporters', 'climate activists')
excludes: Civic engagement (e.g., 'registered voter') without partisan inference
guidance: EU DSA Article 26 is absolute — political opinions cannot be used for ad targeting in EU markets regardless of vertical. In the US, political data is widely used for political advertising but restricted in housing/employment/credit contexts.
